title: InterHub
loginSubtitle: Sign in to the university academic portal
loginContext: InterHub brings schedules, subjects, assignments, and student requests together in one workspace for everyday university operations.
contextPointOne: Check your timetable, subject list, and current academic workload in one place.
contextPointTwo: Track assignments, requests, and academic updates without switching between separate systems.
contextPointThree: Work in Russian, English, or Chinese depending on your study program and communication needs.
loginSupportNote: Sign in to open your account and continue working with university services.
errorUserNotActive: Account not activated. Check your email for the activation link. Didn't receive it? Check Spam or ask your administrator to resend the invitation.
errorGeneric: Could not sign in. Check your connection and try again.
errorNetwork: Could not sign in. Check your connection and try again.
sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to reset your password.
codeSentMessage: If an account with this email exists, a message with instructions will be sent.
resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter the code from the email and your new password.
resetSuccessMessage: Password changed successfully. Sign in with your new password.
errorResetCodeInvalid: Code is invalid or expired. Request a new code.
errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
